Package neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem

Class ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem.ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput extends Object implements Serializable
Normalized input for a NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
